name: Technical design / architecture note

labels: documentation,enhancement

## Problem

What agent-ops or control-plane problem are we solving?

## Proposed shape

Describe the design at the boundary level: inputs, outputs, state, failure modes.

## Evidence needed

- [ ] local-only prototype
- [ ] public-safe design note
- [ ] fake/demo fixture
- [ ] smoke or endurance check
- [ ] README / docs update

## Non-goals

What should this not claim or implement?

## Privacy / redaction notes

List any private data that must stay out of public docs or commits.
